title: IIM Ranchi - Indian Institute of Management Ranchi - IIM Ranchi
meta_description: We are committed to supporting excellence in management education and research that positively impacts people, organizations, and society.
text_content: Interviews for shortlisted PhD applicants at IIM Ranchi will be conducted online on March 20, 2026. Eligible candidates will be informed by email tomorrow. Candidates are requested to check their inbox/spam. 18 March 2026

h1: IIM Ranchi students bag 16 medals in various sports competitions at the Ensemble-Valhalla 2025 conducted at XLRI Jamshedpur
Aahana Talwar, Ansh Rustagi, Dev Tiwari and Ravin Agarwal secured 1st position in XLRI Jamshedpur’s Product Management Case Competition.

Deepak Kumar Shrivastava, Nishant Mukesh Agrawal, Vikas Kumar, Sonal Khurana, Linh Nguyen Khanh Duong (2026). Strategic enablers of sustainability in the Indian medical device supply chain: an ISM-DEMATEL approach. Strategy and Leadership, 54(1), 2026, 42–60
Joshua George Allen (2026). Leisure in a working woman’s world: characteristics of gendered leisure and the role of culture and context. World Leisure Journal, 2026, Article in Press

Rahul Kumar, Shreeya Shukla (2026). Can fragmented politics and corporate political awareness push retailers to go greener? Insights from global multinational retail firms. International Review of Retail, Distribution and Consumer Research, 2026, Article in Press

Alok Raj, Tsanming Choi, Rajeev Ranjan Kumar, Shikha Aggarwal (2026). A framework for understanding blockchain adoption in supply chain operations: a multi-case study. IEEE Transactions on Engineering Management, 2026, Article in Press

Krishna Kumar Dadsena, Pradeep Kumar Rathore, Mathiyazhagan Kaliyan, Raja Jayaraman, Esha Saha (2026). Adoption of circular economy practices in supply chains to enhance firm performance: industrial symbiosis and ecological modernization theory perspective. International Journal of Logistics Management(1), 2026, Article in Press

Siddharth Gaurav Majhi, Proma Chowdhury, Arindam Mukherjee, Ambuj Bhairawnath Anand (2026). Building a cognitive analytics capability: a resource-based perspective. Journal of Decision Systems, 35(1), 2026, Article 2599919

Prachi Tulsyan, Amrita Ghosh, Sobhan Sarkar (2026). Eye-Tracking-Based Packaging Analysis for Toy Industry Using Bayesian Belief Networks and Evidential Reasoning Approach. In Lecture Notes on Multidisciplinary Industrial Engineering, Part F1255, 103–121. Singapore: Springer.

Aman Kumar, Amit Shankar, Abhishek Behl, Demetris Vrontis (2026). Feeling the heat? Metaverse as a platform for motivating pro-environmental behaviour through consumers’ climate (change) engagement. Technovation, 149, 2026, Article 103369
Chahat Maru, Dipanjan Kumar Dey (2026). Consumer escapism: a systematic review. Journal of Marketing Theory and Practice, 34(1), 2026, 88–110
Arindra Mishra, Jie Li, Pooja Sengupta, Asil Oztekin (2026). NLP-driven insights on boutique hotel satisfaction. Journal of Computer Information Systems, 66(1), 2026, 59–74

आईआईएम राँची ने मनाया अन्तरराष्ट्रीय महिला दिवस
तकनीकी शिक्षा के साथ मूल्यों की सीख, राँची के संस्थानों में वैल्यू बेस्ड एजुकेशन पर जोर
